about.title: About me
about.body: I've been a journalist and marketing professional for over 12 years and a Senior Front-end Developer for over 7, including work in fintech, with expertise in UX and UI. I have a sharp eye for detail and build plenty of code for my own projects. I love what I do — moving into development was the best choice I ever made.

product.title: Product focus
product.desc: Deliverables built around business outcomes, not just code.

uiux.title: UX / UI
uiux.desc: A sharp eye for interface, usability and detail.

fintech.title: Fintech experience
fintech.desc: Financial products built with security and scale.

tech.title: Technologies
tech.subtitle: Proficiency level (0 to 10) in the main tools I use.

skills.title: AI & Skills
skills.subtitle: Expertise in artificial intelligence and skills I apply across products.

mindflow.title: MindFlow
mindflow.description: My personal project is finally coming to life! This is one of the first modules: building workflows and mind maps — designed to organize ideas, structure processes and bring clarity to execution. This is just the foundation of a larger ecosystem, with other products that will integrate with it. Lots of news coming soon!

contact.title: Let's talk?
contact.subtitle: Reach out on WhatsApp and tell me about your project.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Content about web and mobile development, UI/UX and the behind-the-scenes of my projects.
blog.empty: No posts published yet. Check back soon.

rumor-handheld-sega-cartucho.title: Rumor: Sega may be preparing a retro cartridge handheld focused on 2D
rumor-handheld-sega-cartucho.description: A Reddit leak points to a low-cost handheld tied to Sega, with a 5" OLED screen, physical cartridges and a 2D focus. I separate fact from speculation and why it makes sense right now.

sonic-35-anos-mega-drive.title: Sonic turns 35: Sega and iam8bit re-release Sonic 1 and 2 on Mega Drive cartridges
sonic-35-anos-mega-drive.description: To celebrate Sonic's 35th anniversary, Sega teamed up with iam8bit on the Legacy Cartridge Collection: Sonic 1 and 2 return as physical Mega Drive cartridges, with a rare edition hidden in 1 of every 8 units.

mods-gta-6.title: The future of GTA 6 mods: what to expect (and what Rockstar might allow)
mods-gta-6.description: GTA 6 arrives with a modding community that already transformed GTA V. What's coming in mods, what changes with the new engine, and how Rockstar's stance could define this scene.

desenvolvimento-de-jogos-no-brasil.title: Game development in Brazil: where we are and where we're heading
desenvolvimento-de-jogos-no-brasil.description: Brazil has talent, community and award-winning games, but still struggles with funding and the domestic market. An honest overview of the national games industry and the paths for those who want in.

qualidade-de-codigo-com-ia.title: Code quality in the AI era: junior vs senior using the same tools
qualidade-de-codigo-com-ia.description: AI speeds everyone up, but it doesn't level out seniority. What changes when a junior and a senior use the same assistant, what happens to learning and legacy, and how to keep quality in the process.

claude-fable-5.title: Claude Fable 5: the first Mythos model Anthropic released to the public
claude-fable-5.description: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, the first Mythos-class model available for general use. What changes, how much it costs, and my take as a dev who uses Claude daily.

author.label: Written by
author.name: Nilton Rocha
author.bio: Developer with over 7 years of experience in web and mobile, focused on UI/UX, performance, AI and SEO. I'm also a journalist and marketing professional, and a video game enthusiast. I write about development, technology and the behind-the-scenes of my projects.

consent.title: Cookies and privacy
consent.message: We use cookies to analyze traffic and show personalized ads. You can accept or reject. Learn more in our privacy policy.
